# Task Log - 12-20-2025 13:56

## Task: Move Cartridge Files to Examples Directory

### Objective
- Move all cartridge files from `Cartridge/` folder to `Cartridge/Examples/`
- Ensure cartridges remain available when running the application

### Current State
- Cartridge files found in `Cartridge/` folder:
  - HauntedMansion.ucart
  - LostCave.ucart
  - Template.ucart
- `Cartridge/Examples/` directory does not exist
- Current code loads cartridges from: `AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory/Cartridge` with SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly

### Changes Required
1. Create `Cartridge/Examples/` directory
2. Move all .ucart files to `Cartridge/Examples/`
3. Update `CartridgeListWindow.xaml.cs` to search subdirectories (change SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly to SearchOption.AllDirectories)

### Progress
- [x] Analyzed current cartridge loading logic
- [x] Identified cartridge files to move
- [x] Create Examples directory
- [x] Move cartridge files
- [x] Update CartridgeListWindow.xaml.cs
- [x] Test changes

### Changes Made

#### 1. Directory Structure
- Created `Cartridge/Examples/` directory
- Moved all three .ucart files to `Cartridge/Examples/`:
  - HauntedMansion.ucart
  - LostCave.ucart
  - Template.ucart

#### 2. Code Changes
**File**: `GameInterface/CartridgeSelection/CartridgeListWindow.xaml.cs`
- **Line 44**: Changed `SearchOption.TopDirectoryOnly` to `SearchOption.AllDirectories`
- **Effect**: The LoadCartridges() method now recursively searches subdirectories for .ucart files

### Verification
- Build successful
- All cartridge files successfully moved to `Cartridge/Examples/`
- Application will now discover cartridges in subdirectories

### Notes
- The CartridgeLoader already supports recursive searching with FindCartridges() method
- CartridgeListWindow now also uses SearchOption.AllDirectories to match this behavior
- This allows for better organization of cartridge files (e.g., by category, author, or game type)
- Future cartridges can be organized in any subdirectory structure under `Cartridge/`

### Status
? **COMPLETED** - All cartridge files moved to Examples directory and code updated to support subdirectory searching
